beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: Textual Canons and Historical Traditions Courses (minimum 5 credits): see department website for list of approved courses Religion, Culture, and Power Courses (minimum 5 credits): see department website for list of approved courses Elective Religion Courses (minimum 25 credits): any combination of Textual Canons and Historical Traditions courses or Religion, Culture, and Power courses. May include maximum 10 credits from relevant language courses such as biblical Hebrew, Coptic, Hindi, Ethiopic, Greek, Latin, and Sanskrit. See department website for list of approved courses.
